description: Brand contract for the Shop single-step checkout starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Shop summary/payment shell uses SDK cart summary prices; upsells support full-price and offer-discounted compare/current modes.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: No tiered checkout picker by default; cart summary and payment shell are the protected SDK surface.
family_inventory.order_bump: Shop bump-check02.html can render only when a bump package exists; otherwise remove the bump surface.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Shop upsell offer includes use upsell_offer or upsell_bundle_tiers with a visible price row above the accept CTA.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.
